rationale: Bug hunt C16 found 0 bugs in llm_adapter_game_master.gd and llm_adapter_prompts.gd. Feature: creator chose 3 few-shot examples (q-20260415-005 option B) with end-game PROGRESS_MISSION + high rep swings. Also discovered PROGRESS_MISSION was silently rejected by _try_parse_effects_dict() (no step field handler) — fixed. Wired echo_memory + MOS convergence zones into build_context_enrichment() for richer LLM narrative callbacks. Veteran status and biome death memory now influence card generation tone.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C17 (3 files: merlin_llm_adapter.gd echo_memory wiring, llm_adapter_prompts.gd MOS zones, llm_adapter_game_master.gd PROGRESS_MISSION parser). Then feature: GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011 option A) or SFXEngine implementation (q-20260414-006 option B).
